import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { GraduationCap, Upload, Plus, Edit, Trash2, Users, Star, DollarSign, BookOpen, TrendingUp, BarChart3, PieChart, X } from 'lucide-react'; const InstructorPage = ({ courses, onAddCourse, onDeleteCourse }) => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false); const [courseForm, setCourseForm] = useState({ title: '', desc: '', price: '', cat: 'development', level: 'Beginner', time: '', instructor: 'Current User', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=400&h=200&fit=crop' }); const instructorStats = { totalCourses: courses.length, totalStudents: courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + course.enrolled, 0), totalRevenue: courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + (course.price * course.enrolled), 0), avgRating: courses.length > 0 ? (courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + parseFloat(course.rating), 0) / courses.length).toFixed(1) : '0.0' }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (courseForm.title && courseForm.desc && courseForm.price) { onAddCourse({ ...courseForm, price: parseInt(courseForm.price) }); setCourseForm({ title: '', desc: '', price: '', cat: 'development', level: 'Beginner', time: '', instructor: 'Current User', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=400&h=200&fit=crop' }); setShowUploadModal(false); alert('Course uploaded successfully!'); } }; const handleDelete = (courseId, courseTitle) => { if (window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete "${courseTitle}"?`)) { onDeleteCourse(courseId); alert('Course deleted successfully!'); } }; const SimpleChart = ({ data, color = 'blue' }) => (
{data.map((value, index) => (
))}
); return (

))}

setCourseForm({...courseForm, title: e.target.value})} className="w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="Enter course title" required />
setCourseForm({...courseForm, price: e.target.value})} className="w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="99" min="1" required />
setCourseForm({...courseForm, time: e.target.value})} className="w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="8h 30m" />

); }; export default InstructorPage;
